name: hockey-smash
description: Static Hockey Smash browser game verification helpers.

scripts.verify: npm run verify:syntax && npm run verify:hockey && npm run verify:actions
scripts.verify:syntax: sh -c 'set -e; node --check script.js; for f in js/games/*.js; do node --check "$f"; done; if [ -d scripts ]; then for f in scripts/*.js; do [ -e "$f" ] && node --check "$f"; done; fi'
